This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] [required] lstmCell float32 tensors with options.bias, options.recurrentBias and options.activations=['relu', 'relu', 'relu']
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test lstmCell float32 actual 2 should be close enough to expected 4 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 1n but got 8388608n

  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test lstmCell float32 actual 2 should be close enough to expected 4 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 1n but got 8388608n

  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test lstmCell float32 actual 2 should be close enough to expected 4 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 1n but got 8388608n
[FAIL] [required] lstmCell float32 tensors with options.bias, options.recurrentBias, options.activations=['relu', 'relu', 'relu'] and options.layout='ifgo'
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test lstmCell float32 actual 2 should be close enough to expected 4 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 1n but got 8388608n
[FAIL] [required] lstmCell float32 tensors with all options
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test lstmCell float32 actual 2 should be close enough to expected 4 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 1n but got 8388608n
[FAIL] [required] lstmCell float32 tensors with options.peepholeWeight and options.layout='ifgo'
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test lstmCell float32 actual 1 should be close enough to expected 3 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 1n but got 12582912n
Harness: the test ran to completion.
